name: Gingerbread - Fruit Sweet
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Spray a 9-inch square pan with Pam. Cream together butter, Fruit Sweet, and yogurt until well blended. Add in the egg whites and beat until combined. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, salt, ginger, cinnamon, and allspice. Gradually add this dry mixture to the wet ingredients and stir until just incorporated. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 30 minutes.
